item.title: Sample Page
item.dc:creator: shopzy@madrasthemes.com
item.content:encoded:
This is an example page. It's different from a blog post because it will stay in one place and will show up in your site navigation (in most themes). Most people start with an About page that introduces them to potential site visitors. It might say something like this:

Hi there! I'm a bike messenger by day, aspiring actor by night, and this is my website. I live in Los Angeles, have a great dog named Jack, and I like piña coladas. (And gettin' caught in the rain.)

...or something like this:

The XYZ Doohickey Company was founded in 1971, and has been providing quality doohickeys to the public ever since. Located in Gotham City, XYZ employs over 2,000 people and does all kinds of awesome things for the Gotham community.

As a new WordPress user, you should go to your dashboard to delete this page and create new pages for your content. Have fun!

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.dc:creator: shopzy@madrasthemes.com
item.content:encoded:
Who we are

Suggested text: Our website address is: http://shopzy.madrasthemes.com.

Comments

Suggested text: When visitors leave comments on the site we collect the data shown in the comments form, and also the visitor’s IP address and browser user agent string to help spam detection.

An anonymized string created from your email address (also called a hash) may be provided to the Gravatar service to see if you are using it. The Gravatar service privacy policy is available here: https://automattic.com/privacy/. After approval of your comment, your profile picture is visible to the public in the context of your comment.

Media

Suggested text: If you upload images to the website, you should avoid uploading images with embedded location data (EXIF GPS) included. Visitors to the website can download and extract any location data from images on the website.

Cookies

Suggested text: If you leave a comment on our site you may opt-in to saving your name, email address and website in cookies. These are for your convenience so that you do not have to fill in your details again when you leave another comment. These cookies will last for one year.

If you visit our login page, we will set a temporary cookie to determine if your browser accepts cookies. This cookie contains no personal data and is discarded when you close your browser.

When you log in, we will also set up several cookies to save your login information and your screen display choices. Login cookies last for two days, and screen options cookies last for a year. If you select "Remember Me", your login will persist for two weeks. If you log out of your account, the login cookies will be removed.

If you edit or publish an article, an additional cookie will be saved in your browser. This cookie includes no personal data and simply indicates the post ID of the article you just edited. It expires after 1 day.

Embedded content from other websites

Suggested text: Articles on this site may include embedded content (e.g. videos, images, articles, etc.). Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if the visitor has visited the other website.

These websites may collect data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracking your interaction with the embedded content if you have an account and are logged in to that website.

Who we share your data with

Suggested text: If you request a password reset, your IP address will be included in the reset email.

How long we retain your data

Suggested text: If you leave a comment, the comment and its metadata are retained indefinitely. This is so we can recognize and approve any follow-up comments automatically instead of holding them in a moderation queue.

For users that register on our website (if any), we also store the personal information they provide in their user profile. All users can see, edit, or delete their personal information at any time (except they cannot change their username). Website administrators can also see and edit that information.

What rights you have over your data

Suggested text: If you have an account on this site, or have left comments, you can request to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you, including any data you have provided to us. You can also request that we erase any personal data we hold about you. This does not include any data we are obliged to keep for administrative, legal, or security purposes.

Where your data is sent

Suggested text: Visitor comments may be checked through an automated spam detection service.

item.title: About
item.dc:creator: shopzy@madrasthemes.com
item.content:encoded:
Follow us

Track Your Order

Get to Know Shopzy

More than just shopping — we’re building a smarter, safer, and seamless online retail experience.

Vision

A world where shopping is simple, safe, and within everyone’s reach.

Mission

To make shopping effortless, secure, and accessible for everyone.

Shopzy started in 2028 with a small persistent team aiming to make online shopping easier, faster, and more secure. As a marketplace for local sellers, we’ve grown into a multi-category platform used by millions across Southeast Asia and beyond. While our team and technology have grown, our focus remains the same: to build a trusted and simple shopping experience that saves time, protects your data, and delivers real value.

Story

From a small startup to a trusted and reliable multi brand e-commerce destination

Built on These Beliefs

Smart Innovation

We embrace digital solutions to create a seamless shopping journey.

Customer First

We place customer satisfaction at the core of everything we do.

Integrity & Trust

From secure transactions to clear policies, transparency drives success.

We believe that every transaction is more than just a click; it’s a connection between people, communities, and opportunities. From the moment you browse to the time your order arrives, we’re committed to creating a seamless experience that puts you first.

Daniel Sunarto

CEO of Shopzy

Frequently Asked Questions

Why did my payment fail even though my account was charged?

Refunds for failed payments are processed automatically and usually take 1–3 business days, depending on your bank or payment provider. For credit card payments, it might take up to 7 business days to reflect on your statement.

Refunds for failed payments are processed automatically and usually take 1–3 business days, depending on your bank or payment provider. For credit card payments, it might take up to 7 business days to reflect on your statement.

item.title: Why Customers Love Free Shipping & How to Qualify
item.dc:creator: shopzy@madrasthemes.com
item.content:encoded:
Free shipping isn’t just a seasonal perk anymore — it’s a customer expectation. In today’s fast-paced digital marketplace, consumers are increasingly drawn to offers that promise ease, transparency, and savings. Among all these, free shipping consistently ranks as one of the top motivators for online purchases.

A study by Statista in 2034 revealed that 82% of online shoppers are more likely to complete their purchase when free shipping is offered. At Shopzy, we see this trend reflected daily through improved checkout rates, longer session times, and stronger customer retention.

1
The Psychology Behind Free Shipping

There’s a powerful psychological effect behind free shipping. When shoppers see a $0 shipping fee, it feels like they’re getting something for free — which often translates into:

  • increased trust in the platform
  • Greater likelihood to repurchase
  • willingness to spend more to meet the free shipping minimum

Even if the cost is embedded in the product price, customers overwhelmingly prefer “free shipping” over separate charges, which can feel like unexpected fees.

2
How to Unlock Free Shipping on Shopzy

We want every customer to enjoy the benefits of free shipping — and we’ve made it easier than ever. Here’s how you can qualify:

  1. Shop Products with “Free Shipping” Labels
  2. Look out for the label while browsing — it's usually right next to the product image or in the filter sidebar.
  3. Use Shipping Vouchers
  4. Apply platform-wide or seller-specific vouchers during checkout.
  5. Reach Minimum Spend Thresholds
  6. Many stores offer free shipping when you spend a certain amount (usually $50 or above).
  7. Browse Our Weekly Free Shipping Campaigns
  8. Shopzy runs regular promotions with free shipping on select categories like electronics, beauty, and fashion.
3
Our Commitment to Smart, Seamless Delivery

Shopzy continues to work closely with logistic partners across Southeast Asia and beyond to bring fast, reliable, and affordable shipping to more users. Our smart shipping system selects the best courier and optimizes delivery routes, all while maintaining transparent tracking and updates for buyers.

As we expand, we aim to:

  • Extend free shipping eligibility to more regions
  • partner with seller to subsidize delivery fees
  • introduce membership perks that include year-round free shipping

“A smooth shipping experience with no extra fees? That’s the kind of loyalty builder that keeps customers coming back.”

Tags
item.excerpt:encoded: Free shipping isn’t just a perk — it’s what keeps customers coming back. Discover why it matters and how you can easily qualify.

  • willingness to spend more to meet the free shipping minimum

Even if the cost is embedded in the product price, customers overwhelmingly prefer “free shipping” over separate charges, which can feel like unexpected fees.

2
How to Unlock Free Shipping on Shopzy

We want every customer to enjoy the benefits of free shipping — and we’ve made it easier than ever. Here’s how you can qualify:

  1. Shop Products with “Free Shipping” Labels
  2. Look out for the label while browsing — it's usually right next to the product image or in the filter sidebar.
  3. Use Shipping Vouchers
  4. Apply platform-wide or seller-specific vouchers during checkout.
  5. Reach Minimum Spend Thresholds
  6. Many stores offer free shipping when you spend a certain amount (usually $50 or above).
  7. Browse Our Weekly Free Shipping Campaigns
  8. Shopzy runs regular promotions with free shipping on select categories like electronics, beauty, and fashion.
3
Our Commitment to Smart, Seamless Delivery

Shopzy continues to work closely with logistic partners across Southeast Asia and beyond to bring fast, reliable, and affordable shipping to more users. Our smart shipping system selects the best courier and optimizes delivery routes, all while maintaining transparent tracking and updates for buyers.

As we expand, we aim to:

  • Extend free shipping eligibility to more regions
  • partner with seller to subsidize delivery fees
  • introduce membership perks that include year-round free shipping

“A smooth shipping experience with no extra fees? That’s the kind of loyalty builder that keeps customers coming back.”

item.title: How to Set Up a Winning Storefront on Shopzy
item.dc:creator: shopzy@madrasthemes.com
item.content:encoded:
Free shipping isn’t just a seasonal perk anymore — it’s a customer expectation. In today’s fast-paced digital marketplace, consumers are increasingly drawn to offers that promise ease, transparency, and savings. Among all these, free shipping consistently ranks as one of the top motivators for online purchases.

A study by Statista in 2034 revealed that 82% of online shoppers are more likely to complete their purchase when free shipping is offered. At Shopzy, we see this trend reflected daily through improved checkout rates, longer session times, and stronger customer retention.

1
The Psychology Behind Free Shipping

There’s a powerful psychological effect behind free shipping. When shoppers see a $0 shipping fee, it feels like they’re getting something for free — which often translates into:

  • increased trust in the platform
  • Greater likelihood to repurchase
  • willingness to spend more to meet the free shipping minimum

Even if the cost is embedded in the product price, customers overwhelmingly prefer “free shipping” over separate charges, which can feel like unexpected fees.

2
How to Unlock Free Shipping on Shopzy

We want every customer to enjoy the benefits of free shipping — and we’ve made it easier than ever. Here’s how you can qualify:

  1. Shop Products with “Free Shipping” Labels
  2. Look out for the label while browsing — it's usually right next to the product image or in the filter sidebar.
  3. Use Shipping Vouchers
  4. Apply platform-wide or seller-specific vouchers during checkout.
  5. Reach Minimum Spend Thresholds
  6. Many stores offer free shipping when you spend a certain amount (usually $50 or above).
  7. Browse Our Weekly Free Shipping Campaigns
  8. Shopzy runs regular promotions with free shipping on select categories like electronics, beauty, and fashion.
3
Our Commitment to Smart, Seamless Delivery

Shopzy continues to work closely with logistic partners across Southeast Asia and beyond to bring fast, reliable, and affordable shipping to more users. Our smart shipping system selects the best courier and optimizes delivery routes, all while maintaining transparent tracking and updates for buyers.

As we expand, we aim to:

  • Extend free shipping eligibility to more regions
  • partner with seller to subsidize delivery fees
  • introduce membership perks that include year-round free shipping

“A smooth shipping experience with no extra fees? That’s the kind of loyalty builder that keeps customers coming back.”

Tags
item.excerpt:encoded: Discover smart shopping tips to unlock the best deals on Shopzy. From exclusive vouchers to flash sales, learn how to save more.

item.excerpt:encoded: The Checkout template guides users through the final steps of the purchase process. It enables users to enter shipping and billing information, select a payment method, and review order details.
